Title: DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_USER_PERMS_GET
Description: Gets permissions of an the user on a graph.
Gets permissions of the user named uname on graph specified by graph_iri.
Examples:
SQL> select DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_USER_PERMS_GET ('http://example.com/Anna/system', 'Anna');
Query result:
RDF_GRAPH_USER_PERMS_GET
INTEGER
 1
No. of rows in result: 1
